3.   The Federation, in making such grant, may impose terms and
conditions to be observed by the State including a condition that
the  grant  is  to  be  spent  by  the  local  authorities  for  a  specific
purpose.

1.   This Act may be cited as the State Grants (Maintenance of
Local Authorities) Act 1981 and shall be deemed to have come
into force on 1  January 1978.
Grant to any State by the Federation

2.   (1)    The Federation may from time to time make a grant to
anyState for the maintenance of local authorities in that State.
(2)    The amount of the grant made under subsection (1) shall
be determined by the Minister responsible for local government
after consultation with the Minister of Finance.
6                                     Laws of Malaysia                             ACT 245
